decisions.decision: Scrapped 3D character controller for desktop OS approach
decisions.rationale: Too complex for deadline, content panels are what gets graded
User wants interactive computer desktop vibe

decisions.decision: Camera position hardcoded from user session

next_action: Build desktop OS UI inspired by last-seen-online — scrape reference, build retro/futuristic OS with icons, taskbar, window chrome, animated transitions
context_notes: Character.glb (3.3MB, 12 Mixamo animations) is saved for later. Futuristic room GLTF is 561MB. Dev server on port 3000. User frustrated with 3D approach complexity — wants fast results on the desktop UI.
